home.title: GoblinOS Assistant
home.subtitle: Your intelligent development companion
home.heroDescription: Experience the future of AI-assisted development. Intelligent routing, privacy-first design, and seamless multi-provider integration—all in one powerful platform.

intelligentRouting.title: Intelligent Routing
intelligentRouting.description: Automatically selects the best AI model for each task based on complexity, cost, and performance.

privacyFirst.title: Privacy First
privacyFirst.description: Your data stays secure with local processing options and encrypted cloud connections.

multiProvider.title: Multi-Provider
multiProvider.description: Access multiple AI providers seamlessly with intelligent fallback and load balancing.

developerFocused.title: Developer Focused
developerFocused.description: Built for developers with comprehensive APIs, webhooks, and integration tools.

useCases.title: Perfect For
useCases.subtitle: Discover how GoblinOS Assistant can transform your workflow

codeAssistance.title: Code Assistance
codeAssistance.description: Get help with debugging, code reviews, and implementation guidance.

dataAnalysis.title: Data Analysis
dataAnalysis.description: Analyze datasets, generate insights, and create visualizations.

research.title: Research & Learning
research.description: Access knowledge from multiple sources with intelligent summarization.

cta.title: Ready to Supercharge Your Development?
cta.description: Join developers who are already building the future with intelligent AI assistance. Get started in seconds and experience the difference.

chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

errors.tooLong: Message is too long. Please keep it under 1000 characters.
errors.auth: Authentication failed. Please check your API key configuration.
errors.forbidden: Access denied. Please check your permissions.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.server: Server error occurred. Please try again in a few moments.
errors.network: Connection error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
errors.parse: Received an unexpected response format. Please try again.
errors.generic: I apologize, but I encountered an error. Please try again.
